flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trinity College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.4k → $70.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trinity College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.4k → $70.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trinity College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Trinity College are 35% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($90.8k vs $67.4k).
